opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You find yourself back in your bedroom at home.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: what happened?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: What didn't happen! We met the master of the entire Guild! who might be your mother.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: My Mother died when I was a baby.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Maybe not! and then the crystal in her walking stick that was some kind of... I don't know, time suction device. When she got near you, it activated!

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: It was like she was in my head. I could hear her inside my head.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: I don't think she meant that to happen...

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: I was lost for a minute, wasn't I?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: yes! But then Addie went all BEAR, did you know she could do that?!

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: I did not.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: She went absolutely feral! She knocked the staff out of the Guildmaster's hands. You went flying, the Guildmaster went flying, Addie growled, and all the cultists ran away!

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: And Da?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Addie grabbed you like you were nothing. The professor ran behind her. I grabbed all the notes I could find because, you know, and I ran after.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Was everybody ok?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: MOST of the cult guys ran away but there was that one with a staff. He threw it at Addie and hit her dead in the shoulder!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Suddenly, the world feels very real again.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Where is Addie? Is she ok? I need to see her!

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: The professor said I was to tell you to stay right.... aaand there she goes. WAIT UP!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Still exhausted, you downstairs to your father's laboratory in the basement. And there she is. The Bear you have loved all your life, who has always been by your side.

opening.speaker: Father
opening.text: I told you to keep her out of here today.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: I tried

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Da, I can help...

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: Someday, I will need to go back to her

closing.speaker: Father
closing.text: But you have everything you need, here

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: Some things can't be changed. Some losses... we have to carry them. But that doesn't mean we stop living.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: Father grabs your hand. Your companions flank you. You wait.

choices.text: Use a false core. Buy time for father to sabotage the device from within.
Pretend to use a companion's core, but switch it at the last second with a decoy.

puzzle.title: The Failsafe Deception
puzzle.instructions: Secretly rewire the device while pretending to install the core. Create a failsafe.
